name: SWFL — County planning monthly (Flow 5, Tier 1 cold storage)

nodes.name: Monthly Cron (3rd of month, 14 UTC = 10 AM ET)

parameters.query: INSERT INTO data_lake._tier1_inventory (id, bucket, path, vintage, byte_size, pack_id, source_url, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::date, $5::bigint, NULL, NULL, now()) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET byte_size = EXCLUDED.byte_size, vintage = EXCLUDED.vintage, updated_at = now();

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $node['Merge counties + build NDJSON'].json.full_id }},{{ $node['Merge counties + build NDJSON'].json.bucket }},{{ $node['Merge counties + build NDJSON'].json.path }},{{ $node['Merge counties + build NDJSON'].json.vintage }},{{ $node['Merge counties + build NDJSON'].json.byte_size }}

meta._authoring_note: Draft. Pre-flight: (1) Replace YOUR_PROJECT_REF in the Storage PUT URL. (2) Verify the county landing URLs in 'Emit county configs' are current — both Lee and Collier have reshuffled their planning sites before; if the agent returns zero rows, the URLs are stale. (3) pack_id is NULL — no consumer yet. The plan-of-record consumer is an env-swfl source connector update; promotion happens in that PR.
